title: leiotulus involucratus
intro: Leiotulus involucratus, also known as the hairy-leaved or hairy stemmed plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Leiotulus involucratus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for those seeking its potential medicinal and health benefits.
